bead.title: agent/test: deterministic review-failure runner fixture for behavioral e2e
bead.description:
Stage 1 of SD-024. Adds a deterministic review-failure runner fixture so beads 7-9 can drive 'N reviews fail then 1 succeeds' behavior without each bead reinventing the seam. Production review path has no test seam today.

In-scope:
- cli/internal/agent/testfixtures/review_failure_runner.go (new) — exported fixture installable into ExecuteBeadLoopRuntime via the existing test-injection seams
- cli/internal/agent/testfixtures/review_failure_runner_test.go (new) — verifies fixture behavior

Out-of-scope:
- Using the fixture in any dispatch-site test (beads 7-9 do that)

See TD-024 §Bead 6.5.
bead.acceptance: cd cli && go test -run TestReviewFailureRunner ./internal/agent/testfixtures/... passes: a test instantiates the fixture, configures it to fail-N-times-then-approve, drives a loop iteration, asserts the configured threshold behavior is observable via real bead events.
